title: The Leonardo Collection Little Stars Sea Life Beaker | Clear Glass Beaker with Handle | Stylish Measuring Cup & Drinkware | Durable Glass Mug for Coffee, Tea & More | Unique Ocean-Themed Design
features: UNIQUE SEA LIFE DESIGN – This beautifully crafted beaker features intricate ocean-inspired patterns, making it a stylish and functional addition to any kitchen.
VERSATILE USAGE – Perfect as a measuring cup, coffee mug, or tea glass, this clear glass beaker is ideal for everyday use and special occasions.
HIGH-QUALITY GLASS BUILD – Made from durable, heat-resistant glass, ensuring longevity and safe usage for hot and cold beverages.
ERGONOMIC & EASY TO USE – Designed with a sturdy handle and smooth rim for a comfortable grip, making pouring and measuring effortless.
PERFECT GIFT FOR OCEAN LoveRS – A unique and thoughtful gift for marine enthusiasts, coffee Lovers, or anyone who enjoys stylish drinkware.
